description: Goose is an open-source AI agent that runs locally on a user’s machine for coding, research, automation, and other workflows. It is available as a desktop app and command-line tool and can connect to models and tools through open protocols like MCP and ACP.
summary: goose-docs.ai documents Goose, an open-source local AI agent with a public CLI, an ACP server mode exposed via the CLI, and a self-hostable remote `goosed` HTTP server secured by a shared secret header.
